spada-single-edge-razor-blade.title: Spada Single Edge Razor Blade (100 CT)
spada-single-edge-razor-blade.body:
Spada Razor Blades are the go-to for professional savvy barbers. Offering an unparalleled shaving experience. These innovative razor blades are crafted with high-quality stainless steel, designed to offer exceptional durability, pinpoint precision

Key features:

  • BARBERS CHOICE: Preferred by professional barbers for precision shaving.
  • HIGH-QUALITY STAINLESS STEEL DESIGN: Crafted with high-quality stainless steel for exceptional durability and long-lasting use.
  • PRECISION SHAVING: Offers a precise shave, enabling you to easily achieve the desired look.
  • SMOOTH SHAVING EXPERIENCE: Guarantees the smoothest shave you've ever experienced, creating a feel as though no shaving is occurring.
  • EFFORTLESS GLIDE: Engineered to glide effortlessly over your skin. Long-lasting
  • SHARPNESS: Maintains its sharp edge over prolonged use, ensuring consistently high-quality shaves.
  • LUXURIOUS FEEL: Transforms each shave into a moment of self-care, providing a pampering and luxurious feel.

Quantity: 100CT Single Edge Blades. Also available in 100CT Double Edge Blades

spada-double-edge-razor-blade.title: Spada Double Edge Razor Blades (100 CT)
spada-double-edge-razor-blade.body:
Spada Razor Blades are the go-to for professional savvy barbers. Offering an unparalleled shaving experience. These innovative razor blades are crafted with high-quality stainless steel, designed to offer exceptional durability, pinpoint precision.

Key features:

  • BARBERS CHOICE: Preferred by professional barbers for precision shaving.
  • HIGH-QUALITY STAINLESS STEEL DESIGN: Crafted with high-quality stainless steel for exceptional durability and long-lasting use.
  • PRECISION SHAVING: Offers a precise shave, enabling you to easily achieve the desired look.
  • SMOOTH SHAVING EXPERIENCE: Guarantees the smoothest shave you've ever experienced, creating a feel as though no shaving is occurring.
  • EFFORTLESS GLIDE: Engineered to glide effortlessly over your skin. Long-lasting
  • SHARPNESS: Maintains its sharp edge over prolonged use, ensuring consistently high-quality shaves.
  • LUXURIOUS FEEL: Transforms each shave into a moment of self-care, providing a pampering and luxurious feel.

Quantity: 100CT Double Edge Blades. Also available in 100CT Single Edge Blades

spada-torq-clipper.title: Spada TORQ Clipper
spada-torq-clipper.body:
• High-strength brushless motor delivering extreme torque and a true 7,200 RPM output.
  • Mini, lightweight body engineered for maximum comfort, precision, and control.
  • Long-lasting lithium-ion battery with up to 5 hours of run time and a fast 2-hour recharge.
  • WAVE Blade technology for a louder, crisp crunch—perfect for bulk removal. Fully adjustable for zero-gap performance and ultra-close finishes.
  • Includes 8 premium magnetic guards (#0.5–#8).
  • USB-C charging with both cable and charging stand included.

spada-torq-shaver.title: Spada TORQ Shaver
spada-torq-shaver.body:
• High-speed motor with extreme torque and a true 10,000 RPM output.
  • Lightweight body engineered for maximum comfort, precision, and control.
  • Long-lasting lithium-ion battery with up to 5 hours of run time and a 3.5-hour recharge.
  • Ultra-thin silver foil delivers an extremely close, comfortable shave with no skin irritation. 
  • Includes USB-C charging with both cable and charging stand included.

spada-torq-trimmer.title: Spada TORQ Trimmer
spada-torq-trimmer.body:
• High-strength brushless motor delivering extreme torque and a true 7,200 RPM output.
  • Mini, lightweight body engineered for maximum comfort, precision, and control.
  • Long-lasting lithium-ion battery with up to 4 hours of run time and a fast 1-hour recharge.
  • SONAR DLC Blade technology for the smoothest and crispiest cutting. With a satisfying crunch sound. Fully adjustable for zero-gapping. 
  • Includes USB-C charging with both cable and charging stand included.

spada-wave-clipper-blade.title: Spada WAVE Clipper Blade
spada-wave-clipper-blade.body:
• Wave clipper blade
  • WAVE Blade technology for a louder, crisp crunch—perfect for bulk removal. Fully adjustable for zero-gap performance and ultra-close finishes.
  • Deep Metal Cutting Blade.
  • Fits TORQ Clipper

spada-sonar-trimmer-blade.title: Spada SONAR Trimmer Blade
spada-sonar-trimmer-blade.body:
• SONAR trimmer blade
  • SONAR DLC Blade technology for the smoothest and crispiest cutting. With a satisfying crunch sound. Fully adjustable for zero-gapping.
  • Fits TORQ Trimmer

spada-torq-shaver-replacement-foil-head-.title: Spada TORQ Shaver Replacement Foil Head and Cutters
spada-torq-shaver-replacement-foil-head-.body: Ultra-thin silver foil delivers an extremely close, comfortable shave with no skin irritation.
